text: Our national public-health charity is calling for evidence-based flavour restrictions on nicotine vaping products. These policies would protect young people while still allowing adult smokers access to reduced-risk, smoke-free alternatives as part of a harm reduction strategy.
topic: flavour restrictions for nicotine vaping products

text: This week, we’re highlighting how proportionate flavour regulations can balance public health goals with adult choice. Restricting certain flavours won’t eliminate vaping, but it will curb appeal to underage users without blocking access for those switching from cigarettes.
